docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-11-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC SEAFOOD
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PACIFIC SEAFOOD
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY THUMM, DMITRI AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC SEAFOOD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-11-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THUMM, DMITRI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PACIFIC SEAFOOD $2,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,270.00, THE COURT FINDS DEFENDANT SOLELY AT FAULT FOR THE ACCIDENT AND THAT THE DAMAGES PROPERLY ATTRIBUTABLE TO THE ACCIDENT TO BE $2200.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SC-108 REQUEST TO CORRECT AND CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER FILED BY PLAINTIFF. (SUBMITTED TO COURT AND ENDORSED COPIES SENT TO ALL PARTIES)
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF THUMM, DMITRI
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF THUMM, DMITRI AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC SEAFOOD
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF THUMM, DMITRI AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC SEAFOOD
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-11-2008 - JUDGMENT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM MARK P. SCHREIBER. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
ORDER SC-108A: REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT IS "DENIED". COPY OF THE ORDER MAILED TO ALL PARTIES.
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SIGNED, SERVED ON DEFT PACIFIC SEAFOOD. ONE IS ALREADY ON FILE.
SC-108: "ANSWER" ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER RECEIVED FROM DEFT (JOSEPH CINCOTTA).
